title: lieberkuhna nudipes
intro: Lieberkuhna nudipes, also known as the "tongue plant," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Lieberkuhna nudipes can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other plants to enhance its effects.
